title: Steps in marker assisted selection to develop new cultivars
author: Ferreira, Juan Jose
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This gif shows the steps in marker assisted selection to develop new cultivars. This task is developed for disease resistance introgression in elite snap bean cultivars. Resistant cultivars are better adapted to organic farming 

 A dissemination task developed by the Plant Genetic Group (SERIDA) for the BRESOV project. 

 This work is part of the BRESOV project funded by the EU (Grant agreement ID: 774244).

keywords: snap bean, plant breeding, marker assisted selection, introgression,
